arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI vs QPR with Joe Rothwell facing inevitable axe
arts.sum: That Joe Rothwell ended his magnificent display against Millwall on Wednesday with a stiff knee likely means Daniel Farke will revert to type versus Queens Park Rangers this weekend. Farke has started Ilia Gruev in the last five Leeds United away games, indicating that the Bulgarian gives the team more defensive protection at grounds where the club might not be as dominant as they would normally be at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's Championship title rivals handed major suspension boost as FA release statement
arts.sum: “Initially what transpired [with Egan-Riley] at the end of the game, I wasn't fully aware of at the time,” said Parker. Egan-Riley' tripped Lankshear as he attempted to run through on goal just as referee Gavin Ward blew his whistle for full-time.

arts.ttl: Marti Cifuentes sends message to Leeds United amid QPR's Championship struggles
arts.sum: Head coach Marti Cifuentes is missing a number of first team players through injury, including midfielder Sam Field and Jonathan Varane. "It is a difficult time because we lost four in a row but I'm so proud of the reality of where we are in the league.

arts.ttl: Leeds United to welcome 25-year-old back for QPR trip
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke has confirmed Isaac Schmidt is expected to be back in contention for the… The post Leeds United to welcome 25-year-old back for QPR trip appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer stance on free agents revealed as Harry Gray handed big boost
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has ruled out a dramatic plunge into the free agent market should Leeds United face an emergency injury crisis, stating he would much rather give the academy graduates a chance. "Because if a[free agent] player is right now out for a few months, then to integrate until he is fit then the season is over.

arts.ttl: Pascal Struijk admission on Joe Rothwell speaks volumes about Leeds loanee
arts.sum: In his post-match chat with reporters, Pascal Struijk noted that it wasn’t the first time he had been asked about the fantastic quality of Joe Rothwell. "He is really good on the ball, drives the game forward for us and especially defensively, you know, he does his job as well.”

arts.ttl: Preview: Queens Park Rangers vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Queens Park Rangers and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Joel Piroe has two words for controversial Leeds United v Millwall refereeing
arts.sum: “Unacceptable” – Leeds denied stunning Joel Piroe goal through offside Leeds United won 2-0 at home to Millwall on Wednesday night, but could have opened up a bigger lead in the first half if not for an extremely tight offside call.

arts.ttl: QPR v Leeds: Grim R’s team news revealed
arts.sum: The R’s are in a poor run of form in the last nine games since January 25, losing seven and winning the other two – scoring 10 and conceding 13 in that span of matches. Last season, Leeds needed to claim victory at Loftus Road in order to maintain their chances of automatic promotion over Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Leeds United man's mystery absence vs Millwall explained as Farke faces 'late' QPR decisions
arts.sum: "As it stands I hope I have that whole group plus Isaac Schmidt to pick from for the travelling squad," he said. Leeds United could be boosted by the return of Isaac Schmidt for the trip to Queens Park Rangers.
